violations.text: Tomatoes were observed with an accumulation of mold build-up in the produce cooler. Tomatoes were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Raw chicken was observed being stored over raw beef in the display case. Per PIC, display case will be re-arranged and divided by a wall. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
Various food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelving, and display case shelving/grates have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

Pumpkin seeds, garlic, and peppers packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
Multiple ceiling tiles in the storefront area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2026

2 door reach-in was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. All food in unit was observed between 41-44 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, service will be called today. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Pumpkin seeds and peppers packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The walk-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice-build up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
Multiple ceiling tiles in the storefront area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2026
